case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. JUAN MANUEL NUNEZ BARAJAS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
